case_title: EQUITABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC VS. SHARON CARINO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CARINO, SHARON DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-27-2011

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITABLE ASCENT FINANCIAL, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARINO, SHARON $1,404.34 PRINCIPAL, $485.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $181.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,070.34, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-17-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
